mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_notification (user_id, type, title, content, ref_id, read_flag, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{refId}, FALSE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_flag = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE user_notification SET read_flag = TRUE WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND id = #{id}
UPDATE user_notification SET read_flag = TRUE WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_flag = FALSE
